title: EFL Manifest
description: Schema for .efl capability manifest files (schema version 2).

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Must be 2 for this format.

modId.description: Globally unique identifier in reverse-domain notation (e.g. com.author.modname). Used for save namespacing, dependency resolution, and IPC channel ownership. No spaces.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in logs and the DevKit.

eflVersion.description: Minimum EFL version required to load this pack. EFL emits MANIFEST-E002 if the installed version is older.

author.description: Pack author name. Optional. Shown in the DevKit.

description.description: Short human-readable description of what this pack does. Optional. Shown in the DevKit.

required.description: Packs that must be loaded before this one. EFL emits MANIFEST-E003 if any are missing.

optional.description: Packs that enhance this one if present. EFL emits MANIFEST-W001 if any are missing.

conflicts.description: Packs known to be incompatible with this one. EFL emits MANIFEST-E004 if a conflicting pack is loaded alongside this one.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation shown in the error message.

features.description: EFL subsystems this pack uses. Only declare what you actually use — omitted subsystems are assumed unused. In strictMode, accessing an undeclared subsystem is an error.

assets.description: Asset bundles included in this pack for runtime injection via YYTK. Only valid when 'assets' is listed in features. EFL's AssetService injects these at boot so the game sees them as native assets.

sprites.description: Sprite asset IDs to inject (e.g. spr_Fluffkin). The asset file must exist at assets/sprites/<id>.png inside the pack.

sounds.description: Sound asset IDs to inject (e.g. snd_Fluffkin_idle). The asset file must exist at assets/sounds/<id>.ogg inside the pack.

ipc.description: IPC channel declarations. Only valid when 'ipc' is listed in features.

publish.description: Channel IDs this pack will publish messages to. Must be owned by this pack (prefixed with modId).

consume.description: Channel IDs this pack will subscribe to. May be owned by other packs.

strictMode.description: When true, accessing an EFL subsystem not declared in features is a fatal error. When false, it emits a warning. Default: false.

areaBackend.description: Area backend to use. hijacked repopulates existing game rooms. native (true custom rooms) is probe-gated — use hijacked unless you know the native room hook surface is confirmed.

scriptHooks.description: Custom script hooks this pack registers. Each entry patches a FoM GML script to call an EFL handler when it fires.

target.description: Exact GML script name to hook (e.g. gml_Script_hoe_node).

handler.description: Built-in EFL handler to call (e.g. efl_resource_despawn).

mode.description: Hook mode. callback invokes a built-in EFL handler. inject is reserved for future GML injection support and emits HOOK-W002 if used.
